atlas.requiredShip: Id say a Fully Kitted Prospector/Golem works perfectly
Perhaps a fuly kitted MOLE or two are required to mine the highest quality versions of these.
Id say a fully kitted Prospector might be able to get the higher quality rocks. Something weird to note, it has two qualities of Ouratite always, one better quality, one lesser.

atlas.primaryUse: Mostly used in weapons it seems.

log.title: Day 1:  Accident
log.body: Just as we arrived to Arial's orbit, the Golem exploded in Platinum Sun's hangar. It seems we shall go rest and in day 2 go get another one.

log.title: Day 1:  Hurston
log.body: We have logged Hurston's minerals. Aluminum, tin, and most importantly Ouratite, all at around 550 quality, and with secondary materials of Agricium and/or Copper. Its good for a start, and we have gathered some materials.

log.title: Day 1: Premature start
log.body:
Due to some issues, instead of starting with the Pre-Expedition blueprint gathering and the in-expedition mining, we shall just log whats located on Pyro, and then after the issues are resolved we shall go to Stanton and explore there. 

Today we start by loading everything into the Platinum Sun: The Golem, the Mining Pods, the Food, water, and mining equipment.

log.title: The Start
log.body: This is where we start. Currently, above Bloom, in Orbituary station, we await for the Platinum Sun to prepare. We shall depart with it, inside of the Platinum Sun will be a Golem for ship mining, an ATLS GEO for FPS/Ground mining, a Fury LX for scouting fast. Then in one pod theres various boxes holding supplies like food, water, and mining modules, and the Fabricator. Then, in the second Pod, we hold Golem mining bags for when we are on transit but need more space. Finally, the last pod will hold all our materials that have been refined.
